They're asking for budget approval for this feature enhancement, but I need to see a detailed implementation plan. We can't afford another situation where promised functionality doesn't work with our existing setup.
This testimonial sounds good, but I need to see actual case studies from organizations similar to ours. We've been burned by vendors who overpromise on integration capabilities.
Why is it so difficult to find the specific technical requirements for this feature? I shouldn't have to schedule a sales call just to get basic implementation details.
Another required field that doesn't make sense for our use case. I'm not giving them access to data they don't need, especially when their privacy policy is buried behind three clicks.

Finally, a vendor that actually understands our workflow challenges. They've documented exactly how this feature addresses our mobile collaboration gap, and they're offering a pilot program to test integration.
